titleEn: Tanmiah signs MoUs to speed decarbonisation efforts
titleZh: Tanmiah签署谅解备忘录加速脱碳进程
summaryZh: 沙特领先的垂直整合家禽和食品生产商Tanmiah Food Company与施耐德电气、Strataphy和Kayes Arabia签署了三份谅解备忘录，以加速其脱碳计划并提高运营能效。合作内容包括碳清单评估、地源冷却系统安装（打造区域首个地源冷却家禽运营）以及将柴油设备转换为液化石油气系统。公司还利用物联网和人工智能优化物流和养殖，并试验本地替代饲料原料。此举支持沙特2030愿景可持续发展目标。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了家禽行业如何通过物联网、人工智能、地源冷却和燃料转换等创新技术实现脱碳，为智慧畜牧从业者提供了可借鉴的可持续转型路径和实际案例。
contentFull: Company News Tanmiah signs MoUs to speed decarbonisation efforts Partnerships target emissions cuts, energy efficiency gains 24 November 2025 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Asia Tanmiah Food Company, one of Saudi Arabia’s leading vertically integrated poultry and food producers, has signed three memorandums of understanding with Schneider Electric, Strataphy and Kayes Arabia to accelerate its decarbonisation plans and improve energy efficiency across its operations, according to a company-issued press release. The signing took place during the First Annual Saudi Agri-Food Tech Alliance Forum at the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture headquarters in Riyadh, held under the patronage of Vice Minister Mansour Almushaiti. The event brought together industry leaders, policymakers, researchers and innovators focused on sustainable food and agriculture in the Kingdom. Deputy Minister for Research and Innovation Abdulaziz Al Malik also attended and addressed the forum.At the event, Tanmiah chief strategy officer Abbas Khan outlined the company’s use of IoT and AI in logistics and farming operations, along with successful trials of locally grown alternative feed ingredients aimed at reducing reliance on imports.The agreements form part of Tanmiah’s broader commitment to supporting Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030 sustainability goals. Under its MoU with Schneider Electric, the company will conduct a full carbon inventory assessment and establish measurable emissions-reduction targets aligned with the Science Based Targets initiative, including guidance for forests, land and agriculture.Supplier engagement and capacity-building to support supply-chain decarbonisation are also included.Through its partnership with Saudi start-up Strataphy, Tanmiah will install geothermal cooling systems at its Shaqrah site, creating what the company says will be the region’s first geothermal-cooled poultry operation. The system will operate under Strataphy’s Cooling as a Service model.A separate MoU with Kayes Arabia aims to convert diesel-powered equipment at farms and processing plants to liquefied petroleum gas systems to cut emissions, improve efficiency and lower operating costs.“This represents a defining moment in Tanmiah’s sustainability journey,” said chief executive Zulfiqar Hamadani. “We are uniting technology, innovation and strategic collaboration to turn climate ambitions into real and measurable outcomes and bottom-line impact, supporting Vision 2030 and contributing to a cleaner, more efficient food production ecosystem.”Through the new partnerships, Tanmiah says it is reinforcing its leadership in sustainable food production and its role in Saudi Arabia’s environmental transformation. translationZh:
Tanmiah Food Company是沙特阿拉伯领先的垂直整合家禽和食品生产商之一，根据公司发布的新闻稿，该公司已与施耐德电气、Strataphy和Kayes Arabia签署了三份谅解备忘录，以加速其脱碳计划并提高整个运营的能源效率。

签署仪式在利雅得环境、水和农业部总部举行的首届沙特农业食品科技联盟论坛期间进行，该论坛由环境、水和农业部副部长Mansour Almushaiti主持。此次活动汇聚了行业领袖、政策制定者、研究人员和创新者，聚焦沙特王国的可持续食品和农业。研究与创新副部长Abdulaziz Al Malik也出席了论坛并发表讲话。

在活动中，Tanmiah首席战略官Abbas Khan概述了公司在物流和养殖运营中使用物联网和人工智能的情况，以及成功试验本地种植的替代饲料原料，旨在减少对进口的依赖。

这些协议是Tanmiah支持沙特2030愿景可持续发展目标更广泛承诺的一部分。根据与施耐德电气签署的谅解备忘录，公司将进行全面的碳清单评估，并制定符合科学碳目标倡议的可测量减排目标，包括森林、土地和农业方面的指导。供应商参与和能力建设以支持供应链脱碳也包含在内。

通过与沙特初创公司Strataphy的合作，Tanmiah将在其Shaqrah基地安装地源冷却系统，打造该公司所称的区域首个地源冷却家禽运营。该系统将按照Strataphy的“冷却即服务”模式运行。

与Kayes Arabia的另一份谅解备忘录旨在将农场和加工厂的柴油动力设备转换为液化石油气系统，以减少排放、提高效率并降低运营成本。

“这代表了Tanmiah可持续发展历程中的一个决定性时刻，”首席执行官Zulfiqar Hamadani表示。“我们正在将技术、创新和战略合作结合起来，将气候雄心转化为真实可衡量的成果和底线影响，支持2030愿景，并为更清洁、更高效的食品生产生态系统做出贡献。”

通过新的合作伙伴关系，Tanmiah表示正在加强其在可持续食品生产中的领导地位，以及在沙特环境转型中的作用。
contentHtml:
Tanmiah signs MoUs to speed decarbonisation efforts 
Partnerships target emissions cuts, energy efficiency gains
